attacking_style: Early breakaway specialist who targets stages conceded by GC teams. Wins from small groups (4 riders) when peloton allows freedom, not late-race aggression.
team_tactics: Minimal team setup visible—operates as opportunist in early breaks when GC teams control tempo. Relies on peloton disinterest rather than domestique support.
terrain_preference: Medium mountain stages with intermediate KOM points. Thrives when breakaways reach categorized climbs offering both stage win potential and jersey points (Sempione, Gran Sasso).
vulnerability: Struggles to defend classification jerseys when required to chase into breakaways (lost KOM at Tirreno 2022). Ineffective when GC teams contest stages.
key_patterns: Exceptional breakaway conversion: 2 Giro stage wins in 3 career participations (67% success rate)
Active classification jersey hunter: targeted KOM/mountains jerseys in both Giro and Tirreno
Wins from small, early breaks (4 riders) when peloton concedes completely, not contested sprints
Defensive jersey tactics: reclaimed mountains jersey via strategic intermediate point collection (Sempione)
Failed jersey defenses when must proactively make breaks while wearing leader's jersey (Tirreno 2022)
form_trajectory: positive: 2 Giro stage wins and mountains jersey defense in 2023 show progression from mixed 2022 Tirreno results
